college_info.college_name: Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, FC Road

highlights.summary:
Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, popularly known as Frameboxx was set up in 2008 to impart industrially relevant specialised education in the field of Animation, Design, Arts, Planning, Architecture and any more. It is located in Pune and it is the only national training studio that is owned and run by Industry professionals. Since its inception, the institute has emerged as a centre of excellence in learning and innovation as it has trained more than 5,000 professionals across the country. The institute has several affiliations to offer degree and specialised certificate courses that enhance professional competence and provides distinguished learning. The details of all the affiliations are listed below:

In addition to this, Frameboxx has also partnered with the Government of India for the Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojna (PMKVY) Scheme for the need of a skilled workforce. Frameboxx has several collaborations with internationally acclaimed technologists and various animation and VFX studios that offer experiential learning to the students. The institute has a team of experienced and passionate instructors who reinforce the curriculum by conducting master class sessions regularly. It provides weekend workshops, training by industry experts and high-end vocational training programmes as well. To meet the quality educational aspects of the students, it conducts training in 3D Animation, VFX, Graphic Design, Web Designing, Photography, Gaming, etc. It also conducts webinars to aim for high-quality online training sessions free for all students interested to learn in the same field.

The major aspects of the institute are tabulated below:

Admission to all the programme offered at Frameboxx is granted based on aggregate obtained by eligible candidates in previous qualifying degree/ exam and seat availability. To apply for the programme, candidates need to visit the official website of the institute to fill the application form and pay the prescribed application fee online. After the completion of application shortlisting process, candidates need to visit the campus of the institute atleast once to complete further admission formalities and seat allotment.

The institute offers skill-based courses to help students specialise in Animation, VFX, Game Asset Design, Graphic Design, Web Design & Development, Multimedia, Broadcast design and other related creative and technical sectors. The details regarding same is tabulated below:

Frameboxx has one of the most transparent placements portals that provides career opportunities to its students in leading Animation and VFX studios all over India. It provides 100 per cent placements assistance to the students for on and off-campus placements every year. Frameboxx alumni have successfully secured professional career with their preferred job category. Some of the top companies where the students of Frameboxx have been placed over the years are listed below:

Check details regarding Frameboxx placements

placements.overview:
Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, popularly known as Frameboxx was set up in 2008 to impart industrially relevant specialised education in the field of Animation, Design, Arts, Planning, Architecture and any more. It is located in Pune and it is the only national training studio that is owned and run by Industry professionals. Since its inception, the institute has emerged as a centre of excellence in learning and innovation as it has trained more than 5,000 professionals across the country. The institute has several affiliations to offer degree and specialised certificate courses that enhance professional competence and provides distinguished learning. The details of all the affiliations are listed below:

Established in 2007, Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, FC Road is located in Pune, Maharashtra. The institute offers courses like B.Sc., M.A., B.Voc and Certificate. These courses are offered in Full Time and Part Time mode. A total of 24 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Mass Communication & Media and Architecture & Planning. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, FC Road offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time and Part Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc. and B.Voc. Whereas, at PG level, Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, FC Road offers courses such as M.A. Frameboxx 2.0 Animation and Visual Effects, FC Road fee structure for all the courses is around INR 15,000 to 5,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Don't join in the NMS Sermathai Vasan College for Women.

review_content.Placements: They provide placement in this college but it is a worthless waste of our time. The placement package is very low like Rs 10,000 per month. Mostly the companies from Madurai will come for recurring. Mostly the students didn't join the company because of the low package.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college is located in the innermost place where only a bus will be available per day. Otherwise, we will book an auto or cab but auto charges 200. The hostel food is very poor, and it causes health issues. The food is limited, and it is very bad. Most of the students leave the hostel after eating food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is situated outside the city.

review_content.Placements: Top recruiting companies do not visit our college for placements. Our college does not provide an internship for students. Our college conducts industrial visit for students. I don't know the highest, lowest and average salary package offered in our course. Teaching and professor roles are offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college does not provide Wi-Fi facility, and the mobile is not allowed here. A laptop is allowed only to study purpose with staff permission. The library is good. Mathematic books and internet facilities are available in the library. Computer lab and physic lab are not improving, and they do not have enough place. A playground facility is poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Interior Architecture and Design - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent place to pursue interior designing.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are excellent. Mostly students were placed. Salary packages offered are according to students work and how they deal with projects. Urbane and various companies visited the campus for placements. Roles of a designer were offered. Almost 80% of the students got the placements from college. IVS has a placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Classrooms are very spacious and convenient. The computer labs are state-of-the-art. The entire campus is air-conditioned. There is a free Wi-Fi facility. We did not face any issues related to the infrastructure of the college. We are happy with our college infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: Master Diploma in Interior Architecture & Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the quality of education, good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: Students will get opportunities to get placed in good firms all over Delhi for internships and jobs. The companies have offered quite decent salary packages for freshers. Students of our senior batch were working in reputed companies. The administration makes sure that all the students appear for placements and interviews. The placement cell is very useful.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-efficient. The college has studios and classrooms along with other facilities. The furniture is well-suited for drafting studios. Common space is available to spend leisure time which helps for interaction and socialising with people. I am not facing any issues related to the infrastructure of the college.

Various companies visit IVS to offer internships and provide the students with a better career.
content.Infrastructure: IVS has a studio design room for students where they can easily do their work or design anything that they want. They provide Wi-Fi facility for students to do their work easily as the internet is useful. We also have labs here.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are clean and fresh with fully air conditioned. Clean and cool environment. Proper benches and equipment are properly available for all the students. Wi-Fi is available but only for staffs or faculty members not for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for Interior Designing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good with Wi-Fi facility and the institute is fully air-conditioned, with updated softwares in the computer lab. The library is updated with the latest books.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent place to learn interior designing course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. All the classrooms are fully air conditioned with free Wi-Fi facility. The library is updated with the latest course content. Medical facility is provided whenever needed. The computer lab is totally updated with the latest software.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities are satisfactory. Good study environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good as Wi-Fi facility is there. Classrooms and studios are as per the course need. A library is also there which is accessible at all times. Drafting tables with parallel bars for ease of drafting are provided. Neat & clean washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with elaborated course content.
reviews.review_text: The institute is well versed with the state of art infrastructure. Well-equipped labs with Wi-Fi. Classrooms are in the form of studios which helps the students to do their work effectively and efficiently. Library is also available with great collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good at our campus.
reviews.review_text: Simply amazing infrastructure. Once you enter the premises, you will think you are in a different zone as the wooden panels, glass partitions look beautiful. The classrooms & labs are fully equipped & computers are well working along with Wi-Fi at the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty & infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The labs and classrooms are very nice with comfortable furniture and lighting. Basic drafting tools are available in the drafting studios. First aid facility is provided to needy. The computer labs have well-equipped systems and printers to use various software.

reviews.review_heading: Interior Architecture Design Institute by experienced professionals.
reviews.review_text: Well planned Layouts and well-lit classrooms, spacious classes, water dispenser, neat washrooms with well laid Computer Labs. First Aid available with basic medicines and variety of books are found at the library. There is plenty of parking space available and the center is quite near to the pink line South Extension metro station.

reviews.review_heading: Great teachers, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are spacious and well lit classrooms. Furniture along with basic drafting tools are provided to us. Lockers are there for us to keep our belongings. Infrastructure is good. Social interaction spaces help us in an effective way. The facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Leather Goods and Accessories Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to take admission in a good fashion design course, then take admission in it.

review_content.Placements: As it is, government institute placements are very good. In the third-year, companies that visit our institution include Bata, Woodland, and other leather brands. At least 70% of our students are placed in good companies with at least INR 5–6 lakhs per annum packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. It is a very large campus with separate boys and girls hostels. There is full Wi-Fi on campus, but in the hostel it is very slow. There is full CCTV on campus, and security guards are there. Classrooms and labs are well furnished. There are basketball courts, volleyball courts, and cricket grounds. In the hostel, there are four meals a day: breakfast, lunch, evening snacks, and dinner.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Bad position. Average infrastructure. Good Faculty.

review_content.Placements: The campus recruiting rates are not much, but our college professors are helpful and provide us with great contacts and help us build our portfolio and professional CVs to get into top brands. The top roles offered are merchandise, visual merchandise, design, assistant designer, etc. 100% of students get internships in our course while studying in our college. Our professors and even alumni support you and give you the right career direction. The average package offered is 2.5-3.5 lacs per annum. The highest is six lacs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our labs and classrooms are fully air-conditioned. Although at present some of the ACs are non-working. Wi-Fi is provided to the students living on the campus. The library is well maintained, with relevant books always in stock. The food quality of the mess has been okay till 2022-October. But recently, all food items available have been upgraded for the students. The only drawback is the position of the college. It is very far away from the proper Kolkata city and requires at least 40 minds of traveling. College buses are given for day scholars.

individual_reviews.title: Very good exposure in this college.

content.Placements: Our college has the best placement records to date compared with other such colleges. We have a perfect placement record of 100%. However, our faculty does ask for our CVs and regularly updates us with any internship opportunities they find. Most internships are unpaid.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good, and faculty are available at any time of the college.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 44 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA. Placement percentage is 75%. Top recruiters are Amazon, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, Hexaware, IBM, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, SAP Labs, Oracle, Factset, and L&T. There are hardly 40% got internships in college. Top roles are full-stack developed, Java developed, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has good infrastructure and classrooms with projectors. We have a big auditorium. Our department has well-maintained labs. The central library is spacious and has a good collection of books. Hostel facilities are average according to my friends, and they used to say the food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: This college is good. Faculty members are very helpful.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed is above 60 percent. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package offered is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS, Amazon, and DMart recruit MBA students. About 60 percent of students from our course get internships. Roles offered are in HR and software job positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and labs are good, particularly the computer labs, which have been recently reconstructed. The mess and canteen are also good. Prices in the canteen are reasonable. Next to sports, there is a ground, but we are not allowed to go to the ground during class time. Yet, there is a sports period to play during lunch break if we want. The food served is nice. I am not sure about the medical facilities, but I think some medical facilities are available. There is a library, so we could refer to books from there.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Vasavi Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: In this college, faculty is very helpful to students, and the infrastructure is also good.

content.Placements: In my college, 50 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies in my course are Tata, Infosys, and TCS. Around 10% of students get internships at TCS.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a separate block for the library. It is well-maintained and has many books useful for both studies and preparation for competitive exams like GATE. Each block has a separate Wi-Fi, which is very fast. Classrooms and labs provide a good learning environment. Though I am not a hosteller, the food quality is best. The college supports various sports such as cricket and basketball, and conducts cricket tournaments every year. Medical facilities and a gym are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is good and improves the programs.

content.Placements: I chose CSE as my course, almost 80 percent of students are placed in different companies but companies are only service based. If you want product based company, you should go through the online mode. In our college, the highest package in my course is 44 LPA by Amazon, which is product based. The average package offered is 13 LPA and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies in my course are Amazon and Accenture. Roles offered in my course are Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Cyber Security.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in our college. The infrastructure is too good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The food available in the mess and the canteen also having the good taste. We also have medical facilities, yoga, and a open gym.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is good, and faculty are available at any time of the college.

content.Placements: The highest package is 44 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA. Placement percentage is 75%. Top recruiters are Amazon, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, Hexaware, IBM, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, SAP Labs, Oracle, Factset, and L&T. There are hardly 40% got internships in college. Top roles are full-stack developed, Java developed, etc.
content.Infrastructure: It has good infrastructure and classrooms with projectors. We have a big auditorium. Our department has well-maintained labs. The central library is spacious and has a good collection of books. Hostel facilities are average according to my friends, and they used to say the food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is good. Faculty members are very helpful.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed is above 60 percent. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package offered is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS, Amazon, and DMart recruit MBA students. About 60 percent of students from our course get internships. Roles offered are in HR and software job positions.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and labs are good, particularly the computer labs, which have been recently reconstructed. The mess and canteen are also good. Prices in the canteen are reasonable. Next to sports, there is a ground, but we are not allowed to go to the ground during class time. Yet, there is a sports period to play during lunch break if we want. The food served is nice. I am not sure about the medical facilities, but I think some medical facilities are available. There is a library, so we could refer to books from there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is good. Faculty members are available during college hours.

content.Placements: 65 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered in 2024 was 13 LPA, and the lowest package was 3.5 LPA. Wipro, TCS, Infosys, Hexaware, and Amazon were the top recruiting companies. Internships were based only on our skills. The college was okay. Internship and placements were based on our skills.
content.Infrastructure: The library is very good with a large collection of books. The infrastructure is also good in classrooms and laboratories. We have a good indoor stadium and gym. We have a large cricket ground and a volleyball court. For girls, we have an open gym. The infrastructure is good.

The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering admission to BE/BTech courses.

These programmes are offered to students across several specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, etc. Further, the college is affiliated with Anna University, Chennai, and offers programmes in full-time mode. These programmes strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. faqs.answer: A:    SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechGeneral Category Candidates must have passed 3 years Diploma with with a minimum of 55% marks in the final year examination or must pass in any recognized bachelor's degree in Science of minimum 3 years duration with Mathematics as a subject. Candidates from Backward class community of Tamil Nadu need to secure an aggregate of 50% marks in the final year diploma examination / Final year B.Sc.degree course. Candidates from Most Backward class community of Tamil Nadu need to secure an aggregate of 45% marks in the final year diploma examination / final year B.Sc.degree course. Candidates from SC/ST community of Tamil Nadu need to just pass in Diploma Course / B.Sc. Degree course.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A growth full college life in my 20's.

review_content.Placements: As a graduate of Sri Eshwar College of Engineering in Computer and Communication Engineering, the highest package is 40 LPA. The average package ranges from 6 LPA - 10 LPA. Companies like Microsoft, Dell, Cadence, Thoughtworks, Lendingkart, etc., came for on-campus drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good and green. We have more than 20 labs for every domain in our college. Hostel is good and maintained in a neat way which is cleaned daily. Hostel food is okay. We too have mario and canteen inside our college where we can have snacks whenever needed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The over-hyped college in Coimbatore SECE.

review_content.Placements: Our course is new. Still, there are no final years. Some students got placed with the maximum salary package of 7 LPA. The minimum salary package offered is 5 LPA. They are in their internship period. The top role offered is an autodesk. The salary package offered is 20 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall building is a little decent, but there is a signal to make calls. Wi-Fi is not strong enough when there are more than 40 devices connected to the Wi-Fi. This is not a good count when there is only 1 repeater per class. Each class has over 60 students. Some of us have to rely on our personal hotspot, which is also bad due to the poor signal.

review_summary.college_name: SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: SECE is the best for good placements from the beginning and eco-friendly surroundings.

content.Placements: In our batch of 2023, around 300 students, almost 280 students got placed in well-known companies with good packages. During our placements, the highest package was 25 LPA, and the lowest package was 3.5 LPA. The topmost roles offered were Software Engineer, Software Developer, and Trainee positions.
content.Infrastructure: There were lots of facilities available in our department. Most preferably, I would say the library, which was useful for all final-year and project-delivering students. Almost all areas of the college and hostels had Wi-Fi. There were separate labs for ECE, EEE, CSE, IT, and Mech. Facilities in the college hostel were good, and the food quality was also good. There was a separate roof for medical facilities called the medical center. There were enough sports and games facilities for both day scholars and hostellers to play. More tournaments were held for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placement with 100%, best infrastructure, qualified faculty.

content.Placements: Our college provides placement training for each student and is divided into different batches to get trained from the 2nd year onwards. The average package is above 5 LPA. The highest package is above 40 LPA. Recently, 10 students got placed. There are many companies that come to our college and conduct internship drives.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure in our college are really good and developed, Classrooms are well-modified within today's version with smartboards. 24/7 availability of Wi-Fi in both hostel as well as college is there. The hostel in the college will be much more comfortable like a 5-star hotel with a separate cot with a free pillow and bedsheet. The food in the hostel has very good quality. It is healthy.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A growth full college life in my 20's.

content.Placements: As a graduate of Sri Eshwar College of Engineering in Computer and Communication Engineering, the highest package is 40 LPA. The average package ranges from 6 LPA - 10 LPA. Companies like Microsoft, Dell, Cadence, Thoughtworks, Lendingkart, etc., came for on-campus drives.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good and green. We have more than 20 labs for every domain in our college. Hostel is good and maintained in a neat way which is cleaned daily. Hostel food is okay. We too have mario and canteen inside our college where we can have snacks whenever needed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The over-hyped college in Coimbatore SECE.

content.Placements: Our course is new. Still, there are no final years. Some students got placed with the maximum salary package of 7 LPA. The minimum salary package offered is 5 LPA. They are in their internship period. The top role offered is an autodesk. The salary package offered is 20 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The overall building is a little decent, but there is a signal to make calls. Wi-Fi is not strong enough when there are more than 40 devices connected to the Wi-Fi. This is not a good count when there is only 1 repeater per class. Each class has over 60 students. Some of us have to rely on our personal hotspot, which is also bad due to the poor signal.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Business Systems - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Life at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering.

content.Placements: Placements are really better here. The maximum package here is 50 lpa, and the minimum package is 4 lpa. The average package here is 6 LPA to 10 LPA. Many well-known companies come for placements. More than 90 percent of students will get placed every year. Internship is also provided from the 2nd year. It depends on the impact of your projects and communication.
content.Infrastructure: Really good infrastructure. Other than classrooms, more labs and IT centers are present here. A library is also here with every book. Unlimited free Wi-Fi is available, as every class has smart boards. The hostel was very good here. It is more comfortable and safe. Food provided here is also good.

description: SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering TNEA cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to the BTech course and its various branches. The cutoff was announced for the reserved and unreserved categories belonging to the All India quota.
For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 7509 to 26215. According to the last round, the most competitive specialisation was , with a cutoff of .

Students can view the SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 7509.

Getting an idea of previous years' cutoffs helps students better understand the cutoff trends and prepare for the upcoming exams accordingly. To assist in the same, below is a table provided where students can view or download the consolidated round and year-wise TNEA cutoff PDFs. In Tamil Nadu, admission to BE/BTech, BE (Sandwich) and MTech Computer Science and Engineering (Integrated) courses is based on class 12/JEE Main entrance exam scores. highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #201-300 under Engineering category. SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 54th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: SECE - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: SECE is the best for good placements from the beginning and eco-friendly surroundings.
reviews.review_text: There were lots of facilities available in our department. Most preferably, I would say the library, which was useful for all final-year and project-delivering students. Almost all areas of the college and hostels had Wi-Fi. There were separate labs for ECE, EEE, CSE, IT, and Mech. Facilities in the college hostel were good, and the food quality was also good. There was a separate roof for medical facilities called the medical center. There were enough sports and games facilities for both day sc...

reviews.review_heading: Good placement with 100%, best infrastructure, qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our college are really good and developed, Classrooms are well-modified within today's version with smartboards. 24/7 availability of Wi-Fi in both hostel as well as college is there. The hostel in the college will be much more comfortable like a 5-star hotel with a separate cot with a free pillow and bedsheet. The food in the hostel has very good quality. It is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: A growth full college life in my 20's.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good and green. We have more than 20 labs for every domain in our college. Hostel is good and maintained in a neat way which is cleaned daily. Hostel food is okay. We too have mario and canteen inside our college where we can have snacks whenever needed.

reviews.review_heading: The over-hyped college in Coimbatore SECE.
reviews.review_text: The overall building is a little decent, but there is a signal to make calls. Wi-Fi is not strong enough when there are more than 40 devices connected to the Wi-Fi. This is not a good count when there is only 1 repeater per class. Each class has over 60 students. Some of us have to rely on our personal hotspot, which is also bad due to the poor signal.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Really good infrastructure. Other than classrooms, more labs and IT centers are present here. A library is also here with every book. Unlimited free Wi-Fi is available, as every class has smart boards. The hostel was very good here. It is more comfortable and safe. Food provided here is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review about life at Sri Eshwar.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have Wi-Fi, have charging ports for every bench, and have smartboards for interactive classes. A medical center is available. Hostel mess provides average food and there are few canteens inside campus with good food. Hostel rooms have all needed furniture, like a bed, study table, cupboards and Wi-Fi is available.

reviews.review_heading: Good, Bad, Ugly - A Review on SECE
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good overall. However, the Wi-Fi in the labs is often slow, and the classrooms are somewhat outdated. The library is well-equipped, and there are many sports facilities; our college has won numerous trophies. The canteen food is also quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with scholarship for merits.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs in college , but the network in college is very bad you won't get good network since the college is in village.The food available in college is good and affordable.The hostel food is also good .The are few facilities for sports but not much encouraged.There is a medical center inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Sri Eshwar College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: It's a better, stress-free campus. We are strictly asked to follow the principles insisted upon by the college to maintain a healthy environment. Our canteen serves all kinds of snacks, breakfast, lunch, and specific recipes followed every single day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Eshwar College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with new buildings. Classrooms are spacious and well ventilated. Equipped with a projector and white box. Good Wi-Fi connection, but slow internet through Sim. The climate will be pleasant, and hot water will be available for bathing. Labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: My engineering college review.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very moderate. The labs are up to date and the classrooms have Wi-Fi connections and a smart board. Libraries have a wide range of technical books. There is a medical centre that has many facilities. There is a cafe, Mario, and plenty of food.

reviews.review_heading: Exceptional Satisfaction: Achieving Success with Top Faculty & high placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is awesome. Wi-Fi is enabled for the whole campus. The infrastructure of the hostel is also well and good. The food provided in the hostel mess is like home food. So no more worries about hostel food. The canteen food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for students.
reviews.review_text: All over college surrounding has Wi-Fi facility. Hostel facility is available for both girls and boys. But some days the hostel food was insufficient for students. Eshwar college has very interesting labs and maker spaces to allow students to perform projects and improve their skills.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped classrooms with smart boards and visual projectors, specialized labs for practical sessions, access to a library with relevant books, journals, and online resources. It also has common areas for socializing and studying in the hostel, on-site cafeteria, and access to medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Exceptional Faculty, Industry-Relevant, Supportive : Sri Eshwar College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: I wouldn't say that the infrastructure is too good, but it's not like it's bad also. It is optimal. But the only problem that our College has is, the signal issues. But it won't be a problem, as our College offers unlimited free high-speed Wi-fi to all the students. The food and hostel accommodation are too good to be true to be honest. When comparing to all other colleges, our college provides wonderful hostel accommodation at a reasonable price. We also have a exclusive medical center for stud...

likes.text: Many companies like Amazon, Zoho, Informatica visited our college to recruit the students.

Apart from that, amenity centre is the major part of our college infrastructure which contains food court, saloon, gym, stationery shop, and indoor games.

likes.text: Our semester exams are very easy for me because I listen to the class very interactively, and their teaching style is quite funny and interesting.
The faculty and training staff are most experience in both technical and industrial knowledge, and this experience is very much helpful for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: COER University review.

review_content.Placements: Placements were excellent. Upto 90% of students got placed, and university provided the training sessions and classes to every student for the preparation of placements which were in terms of technical training and aptitude training. Faculty members provided support in the placement of students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provided world-class infrastructure with modern labs, well-defined classrooms, and hostels with Wi-Fi facilities. It provided sports and cultural scope. All labs were modern and consisted of every equipment. Classrooms were designed with smart LED panel for smart study.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Don't take admission please.

review_content.Placements: The placement was very poor. Only 35% of students got placement, and 65% of the students had to find a job on their own in my batch. Even after my batch so I suggest you guys not go for this. They were giving only 2 LPA of placement after paying the expensive fee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities were very poor even the air-conditioners were not working properly. If there was heavy rain then the water filled up the ground floor, and there was no way to remove that water. There was no good infrastructure or places to study, and even the classes were small.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: COER University is the greatest university I have ever known.

content.Placements: The placements of COER University are very good. All multinational companies come to the college. Top recruiting companies in our college are Microsoft, Google, TCS, and others.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is awesome, and the nature of teachers is great. They always motivate us to work hard and be disciplined students. All the departments have a very good environment, and the infrastructure is brilliant. It is great. It is a very genuine college, and I proudly say I am a Coerian.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful. They encourage students to keep working hard in their studies and curricular activities. They enhance the students’ minds and increase their abilities. They always motivate us. The semester exams are not tough, as they teach very well.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is good, and I hope this feedback is helpful for everyone.

content.Placements: Most students are placed in top companies through Cover University, with the highest package being 24 LPA and the lowest 10 LPA. Amazon, Google, Tower, and other MNCs recruit from our university. All students receive internships at top companies, and various roles are offered at Cover University, Roorkee.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, gym, passion, and many more are provided to students at our university. The quality of the facilities in our university hostels is good, as well as the food available in the mess and canteen, and medical services.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: COER University review.

content.Placements: Placements were excellent. Upto 90% of students got placed, and university provided the training sessions and classes to every student for the preparation of placements which were in terms of technical training and aptitude training. Faculty members provided support in the placement of students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided world-class infrastructure with modern labs, well-defined classrooms, and hostels with Wi-Fi facilities. It provided sports and cultural scope. All labs were modern and consisted of every equipment. Classrooms were designed with smart LED panel for smart study.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Don't take admission please.

content.Placements: The placement was very poor. Only 35% of students got placement, and 65% of the students had to find a job on their own in my batch. Even after my batch so I suggest you guys not go for this. They were giving only 2 LPA of placement after paying the expensive fee.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were very poor even the air-conditioners were not working properly. If there was heavy rain then the water filled up the ground floor, and there was no way to remove that water. There was no good infrastructure or places to study, and even the classes were small.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech.(Hons) in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college had a history that was decent.

content.Placements: There is no percentage of students getting placements, as it is just below 5%, and moreover, nothing is that. There is only fraudulent recruitment being done in the college, as companies hire students during placements and drop them after 2-3 months. College displays fake placement posters, starting with different students who grabbed these packages, but 90% of them are fake.
content.Infrastructure: I was in the hostel for 2 years, and in those two years, the Wi-Fi didn't work a single day, and they are stating themselves as an engineering college. Classrooms and labs are present on the campus. There is no AC facility, due to which it becomes too hot in class.

admission_overview.college_name: COER University, Roorkee Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Date, Fee

paragraphs: COER University, Roorkee admission is both entrance and merit-based for programmes offered at UG, PG, and After 10th levels. A few popular exams accepted by the institution for admission are JEE Main, GATE, and CAT, etc. However, for admission to B.E. / B.Tech, B.Voc, and B.Sc., etc. courses, the college considers the scores of past academics for admission. COER University has 12 colleges through which it offers over 80 courses. The duration for UG courses offered at COER University, Roorkee ranges between 3 - 4 years and the same for PG courses ranges between 2 - 3 years.

COER University admission to UG and PG courses is entrance-based. Students must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria to get admission to the respective courses atCOER University. Check below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for the COER University course admissions 2025:
Pass graduation with a minimum 50% aggregate
MAT/CAT/Merit
A pass in Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate (40% in case reserved category)
Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate
Candidate must have Passed class 12 exam or equivalent with minimum 45% marks in total in the qualifying examination. (With additional bridge course for Mathematics background students)

COER University admissions are merit-based but it accepts scores of National level exams for UG and PG courses. To secure admission to the COER University courses, applicants must qualify for all the selection parameters. Firstly, they must submit the application form and proceed further. The step-wise details around the complete process forCOER University admission 2025are mentioned below:

The mode of application is online. Candidates need to apply either on the official website of COER University or the respective courses. All the aspirants can apply directly on the official website of the institute.

To get admission to the COER University, candidates must first qualify for the respective state/ national-level entrance exam with a valid score and proceed with the other selection rounds or the selection can be done based on merit.

After the final result declaration, the selected candidates will have to appear for the GGSIPU Counselling process (for UG & PG courses) and a merit list of the selected candidates will be released on the official website ofCOER University. For the PGDM course, direct admission is offered to candidates after completing the selection process.
Step 4: Final Admission
After receiving the final selection notification, candidates have to pay a certain amount of fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to COER University for BTech?
faqs.answer: COER University offers Merit-based admission to BTech. To be eligible for admission to BTech, candidates must have Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects with 45% from a recognised board. Additionaly, candidates are required to have scores of national level exam, such as JEE Main in the they not getting admission based on merit. After filling out all the eligibility criteria candidates need to apply for admission form online.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission to BTech at COER University?
faqs.answer: COER University offers merit-based admission to BTech. Candidates are required to have score of exam of JEE Main, as it accepts the score of JEE Main for admission to the BTech programme. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to apply on the official website of the university. If the candidates are shortlisted on merit they are required to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

courses_data.description: The college offers a two-year full-time MCA programme. It is a combination of both theoretical as well as practical knowledge. It provides students with an opportunity to work with the most updated tools to make the best applications possible. COER School of Management MCA aspirants can find details regarding the programme in the below-mentioned table:

faqs.question: How do I get a seat for MCA at COER University?
faqs.answer: Getting a MCA seat at COER University is fairly easy. To begin, students submit an application form for the course. Once the application portal is closed, the university begins with the selection process. The applicants are screened based on marks obtained in the qualifying examination. Those who are shortlisted and offered admissions are required to report to the allocated institute for verification of documents. After verification, students must pay theCOER University MCA admission feeofINR 26

faqs.question: Am I eligible for government jobs after completing MCA from COER University, Roorkee?
faqs.answer: Yes, students graduating with MCA degrees from COER University are eligible for various job opportunities in the public sector. Students who wish to work in PSUs can take various government exams such asStaff Selection Commission (SSC), Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) Exams, UPSC (Union Public Service Commission) Exams, etc.Moreover, some of the popular job roles that MTech students are offered areSoftware Developer, System Administrator, Network Administrator, Data Analyst, etc.Fresh graduates

faqs.question: What is the total fees to pursue the COER University, Roorkee MCA programme?
faqs.answer: The COER University, Roorkee MCA fee structure is a constitution of various fee elements such as tuition fees, hostel fees, exam fees, security deposits, etc. Upon adding all, the total fees to pursue this programme amount to approximately INR 3.91 lakh. Tabulated below is the breakdown of this fees:Fee ComponentsAmountTuition FeesINR 2.17 lakhHostel FeesINR 90,000 to INR 1.4 lakhExam FeesINR 8,500Fest FeesINR 2,000One-time FeesINR 23,500Note:The above-mentioned fee is as per the official source

faqs.question: Can I apply offline for COER University, Roorkee MCA admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, COER University accepts applications for MCA in offline mode. In order to apply offline, interested students are required to visit the university campus. The admission forms are available at the admission office. Along with the form, students must also attach scanned copies of the required academic documents. After that, they can pay the application fee of INR 1,000 to successfully apply.

faqs.question: What is the accepted entrance exam for COER University MTech admissions?
faqs.answer: COER University offers MTech in Computer Science and Engineering and MTech in Mechanical Engineering via College of Engineering Roorkee. For admission to these courses, the institute accepts GATE scores. Those who do not have a valid GATE score can appear for the college level entrance test. However, students must also note that the first preference is given to students who have qualified the GATE exam.Interested students can also check out otherMTech Colleges accepting GATE in Delhi/NCR.

faqs.question: Am I eligible for government jobs after completing MTech from COER University, Roorkee?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who have completed their MTech degree from COER University are eligible for various jobs in the public sector. The role and responsibilities differ based on choice of specialisations. For example, students who have specialised in Mechanical Engineering are eligible to apply for a variety ofrailway positionssuch asAssistant Engineer, CMRL, Project Manager,etc. Students with a degree in Computer Science can look out for job titles such asSoftware Engineer, Data Analyst, Data Engineer

faqs.answer: The application for BSc courses at COER University is currently open for the academic batch 2025. Interested candidates can apply for BSc courses through the official website of the university. Moreover, before applying for the course, candidates are required to make sure that they have completed the basic eligibility criteria. Applicants can apply for BSc courses through the online and offline modes of application.

faqs.answer: The University has a strong career services department that provides 600 placement preparation to each student which includes soft skills, logical reasoning, and technical skills. Over 300 students have achieved the 99 percentile in GATE with the help of free coaching of GATE, UPSC, IELTS and TOEFL provided on campus. In addition to this, 6 out of 10 graduates secure placements in top multinational companies.

reviews.review_heading: COER University is the greatest university I have ever known.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is awesome, and the nature of teachers is great. They always motivate us to work hard and be disciplined students. All the departments have a very good environment, and the infrastructure is brilliant. It is great. It is a very genuine college, and I proudly say I am a Coerian.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good, and I hope this feedback is helpful for everyone.
reviews.review_text: Facilities such as labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, gym, passion, and many more are provided to students at our university. The quality of the facilities in our university hostels is good, as well as the food available in the mess and canteen, and medical services.

reviews.review_heading: COER University review.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided world-class infrastructure with modern labs, well-defined classrooms, and hostels with Wi-Fi facilities. It provided sports and cultural scope. All labs were modern and consisted of every equipment. Classrooms were designed with smart LED panel for smart study.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission please.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were very poor even the air-conditioners were not working properly. If there was heavy rain then the water filled up the ground floor, and there was no way to remove that water. There was no good infrastructure or places to study, and even the classes were small.

reviews.review_heading: The college had a history that was decent.
reviews.review_text: I was in the hostel for 2 years, and in those two years, the Wi-Fi didn't work a single day, and they are stating themselves as an engineering college. Classrooms and labs are present on the campus. There is no AC facility, due to which it becomes too hot in class.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members, average infrastructure, and below-average hostels.
reviews.review_text: Almost all the facilities are available. There is good internet speed in labs. It has working computers. Labs are spacious and in good condition. There are hygienic and spacious classrooms. In the hostel, we have Wi-Fi, laundry, etc. Rooms are not that big. It is also overpriced according to the facilities that they provide. The infrastructure is also not that bad.

reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure and faculty but needs much improvement in placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. Labs are available and well-equipped. Wi-Fi facility is available on campus. The hostel facilities are decent. I am not a hostelite so can't say that much but overall infrastructure is nice and one of the best in Roorkee.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with all facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is up to date and good. If someone wants to join the college he/she would experience a really good infrastructure in the college with an area of 75 acres. The college provides a green environment and a lush green campus.

reviews.review_heading: COER University, Uttarakhand
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is good and well-maintained, with many facilities available here, like a cafeteria, gym, basketball court, and more. COER University also provides separate hostels for boys and girls. The hostels are very good, well-maintained, and have good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I am neutral for my college review at last we have to prepare on our own.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good in our department and labs but the system and internet facility in labs are average. Library facility is good. Hostel facility is average and the food quality is average as well. All types of sports like football, cricket, volleyball, and basketball are available. Annual fest of sports, Run is conducted.

reviews.review_heading: A good and average college for those who can afford the private colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. There are multiple facilities provided for students like many labs, Wi-Fi availability at every place, different labs, and many extra circular activities. The quality of the mess food is great. There is a hospital for medical facilities which are run by the college. Multiple games are played on campus like cricket, volleyball, basketball, kabaddi, football, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure with satisfied amount of placement from the college.
reviews.review_text: In hostel room, they provide you with a table, chair, cooler, attached bathroom, and bed. There is also an AC room according to your needs. And in the hostel, there is a badminton and basketball court, and the quality of food is good, and they maintain proper hygiene in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure and knowledgeable teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a hostel, a playground, a cafe, medical, and many more facilities are available in the college. We have good and huge infrastructure. There is a clean area. Our college has a parking area for cars and bikes. It has great security at every gate.

reviews.review_heading: It has attractive infrastructure and good food quality in the mess and cafeteria.
reviews.review_text: COER University has an attractive infrastructure as there are four buildings with three floors for different lectures. It has laboratories like mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, chemistry laboratories, computer laboratories with Wi-Fi, and the best brand of computers. The library is updated with the latest published books. The hostel has many facilities like neat and clean washrooms, rooms, etc. The mess food quality is acceptable. The canteen named COER Cafeteria is best for eatin...

reviews.review_heading: Fresher's viewpoint of college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very impressive. The campus is surrounded by lush greenery and is well-maintained. Wi-Fi is available on the campus. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. There is a specific building for computer labs.

review_content.General: Our campus is eco-friendly. It has computerized AC. We have administrative block, career placement cell, visitors room, beauty and wellness studio, music (vocals) room, and examination room. There is a reading room for the students. We have a recreation room equipped with TV, CD and DVD players, and indoor games. There is a mess that provides nutritious and hygienic food. Gym is well-equipped. We have fully furnished rooms with all the amenities. It also provides lift, washing machines, aquaguard water coolers, and water dispensers. We have a exception-cum-lounge for the visitors. AC rooms are available on a first come first-served basis.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: As a student, I am satisfied with the college and the learning experience.

review_content.Placements: This course helped a lot in gaining more knowledge not only theoretical but also practical and several seminars are also conducted along with career and placement cells with companies coming to college. Companies like Bajaj Finance, etc visit college for internships and placements. Several institutions like ICA for courses and jobs after graduation.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is nice. Well-equipped library with Wi-Fi facility and computer labs. There is a large ground for events and activities. They provide smart boards for lectures to get a better understanding. Hostels are also available with affordable feels but as I am a nonhosteller I can't explain much. The canteen is also good and the price is reasonable along with that stuck shop is always available in college where u can get various items and necessities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Non-Medical - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is fine, but some teachers are rude.

review_content.Placements: Actually, I am the only student in the whole college of B.Sc. Non-medical from old batches. I don’t know how many students get placed as I know some have reappeared and are not doing anything now, and some are doing jobs in private companies with a salary of 10-12k.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are not cleaned; classrooms, library, all are okay. The canteen is good, clean, and hygienic. Everything else is good too. I don’t know about the hostel as I don’t stay there. I am a day scholar. Labs are not cleaned. Wi-Fi is there, but there are bad network issues.

overview_faqs.answer: Dev Samaj College For Women, Chandigarh is a distinguished institution offering M.A, M.Com, PGDCA, PG Diploma, BBA, BCA, B.Sc, B.A, B.Com. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, IT & Software, Design, Business & Management Studies, Science field. Dev Samaj College For Women, Chandigarh is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Dev Samaj College For Women, Chandigarh has received an impressive review rating of 3.74 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.64 for Campus Life, 2.75 for Placements, 4.33 for Faculty, and 3.97 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Dev Samaj College For Women, Chandigarh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college, and my 3 years were spent in that college with a positive atmosphere.

content.Placements: I was late for the admission, but still they gave me a chance to be part of their college, and on the first day, I was a little scared of being late, but the teacher warmly welcomed me in the classroom, and they helped me to cover my previous syllabus too, and they helped me to make friends.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom are very clean. The sweepers daily clean the classrooms, and benches are good and comfortable for students to study. Labs are well-maintained. Sports room has many things to see inside. Garden is also good. Huge ground is also there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Career guidance and a placement cell.

content.Placements: Around 65%-75% of students from BCA got placed. The highest package is 6.6 LPA. The average package is around 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Tech Mahindra, HCL, and IBM. Top roles offered are software developer, QA tester, web developer, data entry, and analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is eco-friendly. It has computerized AC. We have administrative block, career placement cell, visitors room, beauty and wellness studio, music (vocals) room, and examination room. There is a reading room for the students. We have a recreation room equipped with TV, CD and DVD players, and indoor games. There is a mess that provides nutritious and hygienic food. Gym is well-equipped. We have fully furnished rooms with all the amenities. It also provides lift, washing machines, aquaguard water coolers, and water dispensers. We have a exception-cum-lounge for the visitors. AC rooms are available on a first come first-served basis.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: As a student, I am satisfied with the college and the learning experience.

content.Placements: This course helped a lot in gaining more knowledge not only theoretical but also practical and several seminars are also conducted along with career and placement cells with companies coming to college. Companies like Bajaj Finance, etc visit college for internships and placements. Several institutions like ICA for courses and jobs after graduation.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is nice. Well-equipped library with Wi-Fi facility and computer labs. There is a large ground for events and activities. They provide smart boards for lectures to get a better understanding. Hostels are also available with affordable feels but as I am a nonhosteller I can't explain much. The canteen is also good and the price is reasonable along with that stuck shop is always available in college where u can get various items and necessities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Non-Medical - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything is fine, but some teachers are rude.

content.Placements: Actually, I am the only student in the whole college of B.Sc. Non-medical from old batches. I don’t know how many students get placed as I know some have reappeared and are not doing anything now, and some are doing jobs in private companies with a salary of 10-12k.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are not cleaned; classrooms, library, all are okay. The canteen is good, clean, and hygienic. Everything else is good too. I don’t know about the hostel as I don’t stay there. I am a day scholar. Labs are not cleaned. Wi-Fi is there, but there are bad network issues.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Amazing faculty and teachers.

content.Placements: Placement cell is very helpful and good placement percentage. Many Diploma courses offered to be job ready and learn hands on skills. Regular seminars and career counsellings are held to help students decide their career. Many internship opportunities are provided.
content.Infrastructure: Facility infrastructure everything is good. Labs are in good condition. You can get every types of books easily on the library. Ncc and nss activities are a must to join here. Great ncc training. Canteen is good and food is hiegyinic. Wi-Fi is available.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, and my 3 years were spent in that college with a positive atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Classroom are very clean. The sweepers daily clean the classrooms, and benches are good and comfortable for students to study. Labs are well-maintained. Sports room has many things to see inside. Garden is also good. Huge ground is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Career guidance and a placement cell.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is eco-friendly. It has computerized AC. We have administrative block, career placement cell, visitors room, beauty and wellness studio, music (vocals) room, and examination room. There is a reading room for the students. We have a recreation room equipped with TV, CD and DVD players, and indoor games. There is a mess that provides nutritious and hygienic food. Gym is well-equipped. We have fully furnished rooms with all the amenities. It also provides lift, washing machines, aquaguar...

reviews.review_heading: As a student, I am satisfied with the college and the learning experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is nice. Well-equipped library with Wi-Fi facility and computer labs. There is a large ground for events and activities. They provide smart boards for lectures to get a better understanding. Hostels are also available with affordable feels but as I am a nonhosteller I can't explain much. The canteen is also good and the price is reasonable along with that stuck shop is always available in college where u can get various items and necessities.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is fine, but some teachers are rude.
reviews.review_text: Labs are not cleaned; classrooms, library, all are okay. The canteen is good, clean, and hygienic. Everything else is good too. I don’t know about the hostel as I don’t stay there. I am a day scholar. Labs are not cleaned. Wi-Fi is there, but there are bad network issues.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing faculty and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facility infrastructure everything is good. Labs are in good condition. You can get every types of books easily on the library. Ncc and nss activities are a must to join here. Great ncc training. Canteen is good and food is hiegyinic. Wi-Fi is available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent teachers.
reviews.review_text: Many books are available in the library. There are 3 computer labs for the programmers and 3 fashion designing labs for the designers. Our classrooms are well-equipped with smart boards. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The quality of food in the canteen is good. There is a tuck shop, a parlor, a gollgappe, and a fruit corner. There are 3 seminar rooms and labs for science students. Some hostels are very secure as attendance is taken twice a day.

reviews.review_heading: The only good thing about this course is its attendance criteria.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are dusty. Computers in labs rarely work, so we can't do our practicals properly. The library is good. It can be rated 3 out of 5. We don't have access to Wi-Fi. The canteen is fine, but I never went there.

reviews.review_heading: There is an average infrastructure, but there are great teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has Wi-Fi. There is a canteen and resource room. The quality of food served in the mess is also good. There is not much crowd in the college. It is an average college and not very reputed with moderate infrastructure. It is completely a girls' college, so it is a bit strict. Warden is also polite and responsible in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this college provides a safe and healthy environment for students.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are provided like on-campus Wi-Fi, smart classes, a good huge ground, a salon, and a canteen that provides a wide range of food. Classrooms, labs, and library are very well-equipped. The facilities that are provided in our hostel are good with a Wi-Fi connection, neat and clean washrooms, an elevator, a well-maintained gym, common rooms, and a study room.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of supportive and friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are quite spacious. Some of them have smart boards which promote dustless teaching. One can have free access to Wi-Fi on college premises and in the hostel as well. Healthy and clean food is provided in the hostel mess.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members of 2021.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available in our college. The mess and canteen are up to the mark here. I really like the atmosphere of our college. Although it's a girls college, everything is good here. Students must try to get a low-key life here along with the benefits of the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college because of its good teachers, good infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms here are neat and clean. Wi-Fi signals somewhat get distracted, but it is good. An elevator facility is also available so that students don't face any problems. Labs are properly facilitated, and the library is equipped with proper books. The hostel is perfect, and the food served is also tasty in our mess. Medical facilities are properly available. Indoor games and outdoor sports are available. There is also a gym facility.

reviews.review_heading: It has experienced teachers and a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food in the mess and in the canteen is good. The canteen provides a lot of different food items like samosa, patties, pasta, noodles, spring rolls, cholle bhature and dosa, along with all kinds of beverages. There are lots of tables in the canteen. Mess food is also good, and curry chawal is the best sabji they offer in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and supportive faculty members. But placements were poor.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was satisfactory. We had classrooms and laboratory. The library was good, maintained and cleaned. Hostel facilities include mess and sports areas. The canteen was according to the will of the students, and it was spacious. We had integrated audio-visual teaching.

reviews.review_heading: I was satisfied with the teaching and supporting part provided but dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for students here include a library, Wi-Fi, cafeteria, labs, music and dance room, sports room, medical facilities, etc. The quality of the facilities provided here was good, and all the infrastructure and facilities provided by the college was safe. But our college should offer the counselling sessions to students which help them to know their interests for future career and plans.

Students will get various career opportunities after completing the course in NIFD, Global Dehradun. Some of them include Industrial Engineering and Design, Product Research Analyst, Communication Design, Product Design, and Engineering, Visual Design, Animation, and Automotive Designing. In addition, NIFD, Global Dehradun also has collaborations with National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC) and Medhavi Skills University (MSU).

faqs.question: Is NIFD, Global Dehradun good?

answer.text: MDes is a postgraduate specialised design degree programme. MDes is typically pursued by individuals who have a passion for the arts and want to excel in the design industry. Students can check the list of reasons to pursue MDes course from NIF Global, Dehradun:A Master of Design degree is the gateway to specialisation and research as it is an advanced degree to conquer the Fashion and Design Industry in different disciplines such as Craft, Textiles, Special Needs, Publications, Media, Lifestyle Products, Graphics, and User Experience Design.The scope of a Master of Design degree is huge as it opens opportunities in various streams such as Industrial Engineering and Design, Product Research Analyst, Communication Design, Product Design, and Engineering, Visual Design, Animation, and Automotive Designing.Every day, the world of design evolves, and as a result, the demand for motivated and creative designers grows. During this degree, students will have the opportunity to work on assignments that will provide them with hands-on experience working in design studios.The aspirants of MDes can get find better job opportunities after MDes and enhance their pay scale. The programme prepares individuals to become entrepreneurs after completing the course or having appropriate skills. Following the conclusion of the course, many graduates have launched their own clothing lines.

lists: A Master of Design degree is the gateway to specialisation and research as it is an advanced degree to conquer the Fashion and Design Industry in different disciplines such as Craft, Textiles, Special Needs, Publications, Media, Lifestyle Products, Graphics, and User Experience Design.

The scope of a Master of Design degree is huge as it opens opportunities in various streams such as Industrial Engineering and Design, Product Research Analyst,  Communication Design,  Product Design, and Engineering, Visual Design,  Animation, and Automotive Designing.

Every day, the world of design evolves, and as a result, the demand for motivated and creative designers grows. During this degree, students will have the opportunity to work on assignments that will provide them with hands-on experience working in design studios.

The aspirants of MDes can get find better job opportunities after MDes and enhance their pay scale. The programme prepares individuals to become entrepreneurs after completing the course or having appropriate skills. Following the conclusion of the course, many graduates have launched their own clothing lines.

Candidates must apply online through the college's official website and pay an application fee to complete the procedure.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

STEP 3: Merit List and Admission Confirmation
After the selection rounds, the college publishes a merit list. To confirm their seat, candidates must pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.
