fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG level, the institute has courses such as BTech, BSc, BCom, BPharm, etc. while at the PG level Sankalchand Patel University Visnagar Gujarat extends courses such as MTech, MSc, MPharm, MDS, MDes, etc. The university also offers PhD programme.

faqs.answer: A:    Depending on the particular degree you're interested in, Sankalchand Patel University (SPU) accepts scores from a variety of entrance tests for admission to its undergraduate and graduate programmes. GUJCET, SPU-CET, JEE Main, and so on. SPU may also take into account test results from other programmes, such as the NEET for pharmacy (B.Pharma), CAT for MBA (MBA), CLAT for law (LL.B.), etc. Exam results from the GATE, CAT, GMAT, GRE, or university-specific entrance tests are required for the majority of postgraduate programmes, including M.Tech, M.Pharma, M.Sc., MBA, and so on.For some programmes, such as M.Tech and M.Sc., SPU administers its own postgraduate entrance test (SPU-PET). SPU provides minimal eligibility requirements for each programme, such as a needed percentage in Class 12th or qualifying scores in prior admission tests, in addition to entrance exam results. The number of candidates, exam difficulty, and available seats are some of the elements that affect the cut-off scores for each programme and entrance exam.For up-to-date deadline information, visit the university website or get in touch with the admissions department.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Sankalchand Patel University for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into SPU for a MTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Students must pass BE/BTech or equivalent examination with a minimum of 50% for the General Category and 45% aggregate for SC/ST/SEBC. Sankalchand Patel University offers full-time M.Tech courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid GATE exam score/ACPC Admission. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass BE/BTech (common eligibility).
faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to M.Tech at Sankalchand Patel University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates cannot join Sankalchand Patel University without an entrance exam.  The university offers courses, such as MBBS, BTech, BPharma, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and Diploma courses. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, NEET, NEET MDS, etc. for admission to specific courses. Sankalchand Patel University offers 20 courses at the UG and PG levels in multiple streams like Arts, Business & Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, etc.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to various courses at Sankalchand Patel University without appearing in any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    To secure admission to the Sankalchand Patel University BBA programme, candidates need to have passed their Class 12 in any stream from a recognised board. Candidates should ensure that they fulfill the required eligibility criteria prior to applying. Candidates are also required to provide supporting documents to establish their eligibility. In order to confirm their seat, they need to pay the relevant course fee.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BTech course is available at Sankalchand Patel University. The university offers BTech courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enroll for BTech course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 45% aggregate (PCM), 40% for SC, ST, SEBC. SPU admission process is entrance-based.

overview_faqs.question: Is M.Tech expensive at Sankalchand Patel University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Sankalchand Patel University is ranges between INR 2 lakh-INR 2.6 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students opting for hostel facility have to pay other fee components such as hostel rent, mess bill, establishment charges, etc. Students need to pay the fee only in the online mode.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Sankalchand Patel University?
overview_faqs.answer: Fee schedules for various programmes vary. In comparison to B.A. programmes, B.Tech programmes may cost more. A separate tuition price may apply to each of the many groups for which SPU reserves seats, such as General, SC/ST, OBC, etc. Fees for B.Tech programmes range from INR 41,000 to INR 80,000 for general category candidates. However, the charge will drop from INR 21,000 to INR 41,000 for the SC/ST category. About INR 58,000 for general category applicants and INR 29,000 for SC/ST applicants will be the cost for B.Pharma.There will be a fee of around INR 48,000 for SC/ST applicants and INR 95,000 for general applicants for BBA.For BCA, the general category price will be approximately INR 45,000, while the SC/ST category fee would be INR 22,000. The additional hostel fees for staying on campus can cost anything from INR 15,000 to INR 25,000 per semester. Meal costs, which range from INR 12,000 to INR 18,000 per semester, are subject to change based on the plan you select.

review_summary.college_name: Sankalchand Patel University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Campus life is vibrant with cultural and technical fests.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students from AI & this get placed every year. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA, the average package offered is 4 to 6 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Capgemini. Internships are offered in firms like TCS iON and AI/ML startups. Roles include Data Analyst, AI Engineer, Software Developer, and ML Engineer. Placement training and mock interviews help improve results.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. AI labs are equipped with the latest software and high end systems. The hostel has spacious rooms with Wi-Fi and 24/7 security. Food in the mess is decent with hygienic preparation. Medical facilities, sports, and a gym are available for students. Overall, infrastructure supports both academics and personal growth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent start, but it needs improvement.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are limited especially for core branches. Only a few companies visit the campus and the packages offered are mostly low. Students are good and almost all receive placement training but it's not very impactful in terms of real results.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but non-AC rooms and labs are also adequate. Classes are clean, and the service provided at facilities is okay. The college is clean, and overall, it's good. I'd give it 5 stars.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good and powerful, and they provide good learning experiences. Some professors are helpful and experienced, while others are less engaging or hard to approach. Teaching methods are mostly theory-based with a limited focus on overall practical knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: For me, the placements are decent, but faculty or infrastructure is good. The campus is also good.

content.Placements: Placements are decent in our college. Only 20-30% of students get good placements through college. So, I would rate it three stars only. Students got placed with good packages. Many students got internships from college in good companies. The faculty also helps in placement training.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure facilities, like new labs and an auditorium. The hostel infrastructure is not good enough, but they are renovating it. Our college campus is way better than our college because we have all right to do whatever we want to do.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sankalchand Patel College of Engineering, Gujrat.

content.Placements: Placements are decent in our college. Only 20%-30% of students get good placements through college. So I would rate three stars only. Students got placed with good packages. Many students got internships from my course in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of my department and college are very good and our college work very hard on it for good attention from students for new admission. We have free Wi-Fi, and good and clean labs with all machines. We also have library and classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Feb 24)- Diploma in Information and Communication Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college with amazing infrastructure.

content.Placements: Up to 60% of our college allowed people to study in our college. Our college provides the highest package of Rs. 1,00,000. The lowest is Rs. 12,000. It is a very good college. Teachers are very helpful in every situation. They help us a lot.
content.Infrastructure: We have a computer in every lab. They provide us with internet too. We have a good canteen which provides us unlimited full dishes for Rs. 70. In the canteen, vada pav, dosa, bhel, bhaji pav, cold drinks, water bottles, etc., are present. Our canteen has a good design for winter and summer like providing AC and fans in summer.

paragraphs: Sankalchand Patel University admissionsare mainly entrance-based. The admission process at the university requires students to register at the website of the university. Interested students can follow the steps below to completeSankalchand Patel University admission process:
SPU Application Process

The mode of application is online/offline. Students must apply for JEE Main for BTech, CMAT for MBA etc., for admission to the various courses. They can fill out the application form on the university's official website.

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as GATE, NEET, etc for admission to the MTech, MBBS among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
Merit List and Admission Confirmation

After the release ofSankalchand Patel University cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay the Sankalchand Patel University fee to confirm their seats in the university.

SPU feesmay include various components such as tuition fees, admission fees, caution deposits, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. The table below mentions the Sankalchand Patel University fees for various UG & PG courses:

The median package recorded during Sankalchand Patel University placements 2024 was INR 8.42 LPA . Further, the median package offered during Sankalchand Patel University PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2024 stood at INR 10.98 LPA and INR 9.89 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Sankalchand Patel University?
faqs.answer: Fee schedules for various programmes vary. In comparison to B.A. programmes, B.Tech programmes may cost more. A separate tuition price may apply to each of the many groups for which SPU reserves seats, such as General, SC/ST, OBC, etc. Fees for B.Tech programmes range from INR 41,000 to INR 80,000 for general category candidates. However, the charge will drop from INR 21,000 to INR 41,000 for the SC/ST category. About INR 58,000 for general category applicants and INR 29,000 for SC/ST applicants will be the cost for B.Pharma. There will be a fee of around INR 48,000 for SC/ST applicants and INR 95,000 for general applicants for BBA.For BCA, the general category price will be approximately INR 45,000, while the SC/ST category fee would be INR 22,000. The additional hostel fees for staying on campus can cost anything from INR 15,000 to INR 25,000 per semester. Meal costs, which range from INR 12,000 to INR 18,000 per semester, are subject to change based on the plan you select.

college_info.college_name: Sankalchand Patel University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The total tuition fee for Sankalchand Patel University is ranges between INR 2 lakh-INR 2.6 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students opting for hostel facility have to pay other fee components such as hostel rent, mess bill, establishment charges, etc. Students need to pay the fee only in the online mode.

Fee schedules for various programmes vary. In comparison to B.A. programmes, B.Tech programmes may cost more. A separate tuition price may apply to each of the many groups for which SPU reserves seats, such as General, SC/ST, OBC, etc. Fees for B.Tech programmes range from INR 41,000 to INR 80,000 for general category candidates. However, the charge will drop from INR 21,000 to INR 41,000 for the SC/ST category. About INR 58,000 for general category applicants and INR 29,000 for SC/ST applicants will be the cost for B.Pharma.

There will be a fee of around INR 48,000 for SC/ST applicants and INR 95,000 for general applicants for BBA.For BCA, the general category price will be approximately INR 45,000, while the SC/ST category fee would be INR 22,000. The additional hostel fees for staying on campus can cost anything from INR 15,000 to INR 25,000 per semester. Meal costs, which range from INR 12,000 to INR 18,000 per semester, are subject to change based on the plan you select.

A total of six scholarships are offered at Sankalchand Patel University for ST students. The family income should be between INR 2.50 lakh-INR 4.50 Lacs as per respective scholarship. Student can check the table below for more details:

Aspirants who wish to avail  the Sankalchand Patel University scholarship for BSc need to ensure they possess the necessary eligibility criteria. The university provides numerous scholarships in order to extend financial assistance to eligible candidates. Aspirants interested in get the scholarship can visit the official website. The university also provides Gujarat government scholarships.

college_info.college_name: Cresta School of Management, Science and Arts: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: What's new at Cresta School of Management, Science and Arts? Admissions are open for the academic year 2022.

placements.overview:
Cresta School of Management, Science and Arts is an institute in Mysore, Karnataka. At the UG levels, the institute offers 9 courses across 1 specialisation in Full Time mode. The popular Cresta School of Management, Science and Arts programs include BCA, B.Com and BBA. Cresta School of Management, Science and Arts courses are provided in several streams including Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce, etc. The fees at Cresta School of Management, Science and Arts ranges between INR 2,35,000 to 2,85,900 for the different courses. Cresta School of Management, Science and Arts placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 3,55,556. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

Q. What are the facilities offered by Cresta School of Management, Science and Arts?

A. The facilities offered by Cresta School of Management, Science and Arts are smart classrooms, outdoor sports grounds for the games and sports activities like football, cricket, basketball, hockey, fitness training & athletics, and an indoor sports club for playing table tennis, snooker, foosball, chess, etc, and also provides auditoriums, cafeteria, and start-of-the-art hostel. The college offers transportation facilities in and around Mysore.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and good infrastructure were provided

review_content.Placements: Around 70 percent of students were placed. The highest salary offered was 9.8 LPA, and the lowest salary was 4.5 LPA. About 40 percent of students got internships. Top roles were offered through college-based stalls and various opportunities such as group-stage and stage performances. Students also got opportunities in companies like Decathlon and malls such as Max, Pepe Jeans, and Lifestyle.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provided very hygienic and tasty food. The infrastructure was Wi-Fi-based. There were top-rated co-curricular activities and good hostel facilities with a hygienic mess. Parking was also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college is awesome because the passing percentage of college in 2019 was 90%.

review_content.Placements: Above 75% of students are placed in college in my course (BCA). The highest package was 50,000 and the lowest was 15,000. The top recruiting companies are Infosys and many other companies. Top roles were web designer, code developer, and programmer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides different opportunities for sports. Infrastructure is too good. Wi-Fi speed is not that good; it is slow. The labs are also good, and the labs are open all the time. The college canteen is too good, and the food in the canteen is too good. There are no medical facilities available in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA Hons.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college and it provides good placements and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Almost 75% of students get placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 0.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Byju's, Honda, Uber, etc. All students get internships each semester. They get 8 internships for four years.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Smart classrooms are available for better understanding. The hostel resembles a home. The hostel is good with 2-4 sharing rooms. There are different types of food and they are hygiene. Sports and ambulance facilities are also available in our college. The computer laboratory is available to get good coding experience.

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in Cloud Computing and Digital Science - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is really a good campus.

review_content.Placements: There are several excellent placements. They hold pool expos on the college campus. The campus was visited by more than 90 companies. Students were given the opportunity to try out for companies. It was a fantastic experience, and there are industrial visits every month.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are basketball courts and foosball tables. The classrooms are very large, and smartboards have been installed to make it easier for students to do seminars and presentations. There is an auditorium as well as a cafeteria where students can relax after classes. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Cresta School of Management.

review_content.Placements: Around 80-85% of students are placed at Infosys, Reliance, etc. All the students got internships in different companies. Students are also talented and from different companies, we get offers for the job. Some are satisfied and few people get disappointed with starting salary.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very clean and hygenic. Hostel is maintained clean. Food was good enough and have a sports coach to train us.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful to us. They will teach us many times. Semester exams are common in every colleges that are easy if we study and difficult if not.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) with CA - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Cresta- a college that meets your expectations upto a certain level.

review_content.Placements: I am not sure about the placements in cresta, because I'm still studying in this college. But I've heard from a lot of people that cresta offers good placements for its students. As of now, it's just my notion from other people about placements in cresta .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well and good in cresta. It has a good campus with a ground for sports. Spacious and well ventilated classrooms, stage for programs and excellent teachers. About the hostel food, I've heard from my friends that the hostel food isn't that good. But the canteen food is quite good.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Cloud Computing and Digital Science - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is really a good campus.

content.Placements: There are several excellent placements. They hold pool expos on the college campus. The campus was visited by more than 90 companies. Students were given the opportunity to try out for companies. It was a fantastic experience, and there are industrial visits every month.
content.Infrastructure: There are basketball courts and foosball tables. The classrooms are very large, and smartboards have been installed to make it easier for students to do seminars and presentations. There is an auditorium as well as a cafeteria where students can relax after classes. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Cresta School of Management.

content.Placements: Around 80-85% of students are placed at Infosys, Reliance, etc. All the students got internships in different companies. Students are also talented and from different companies, we get offers for the job. Some are satisfied and few people get disappointed with starting salary.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very clean and hygenic. Hostel is maintained clean. Food was good enough and have a sports coach to train us.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful to us. They will teach us many times. Semester exams are common in every colleges that are easy if we study and difficult if not.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good infrastructure were provided
reviews.review_text: The college provided very hygienic and tasty food. The infrastructure was Wi-Fi-based. There were top-rated co-curricular activities and good hostel facilities with a hygienic mess. Parking was also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is awesome because the passing percentage of college in 2019 was 90%.
reviews.review_text: The college provides different opportunities for sports. Infrastructure is too good. Wi-Fi speed is not that good; it is slow. The labs are also good, and the labs are open all the time. The college canteen is too good, and the food in the canteen is too good. There are no medical facilities available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and it provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Smart classrooms are available for better understanding. The hostel resembles a home. The hostel is good with 2-4 sharing rooms. There are different types of food and they are hygiene. Sports and ambulance facilities are also available in our college. The computer laboratory is available to get good coding experience.

reviews.review_heading: It is really a good campus.
reviews.review_text: There are basketball courts and foosball tables. The classrooms are very large, and smartboards have been installed to make it easier for students to do seminars and presentations. There is an auditorium as well as a cafeteria where students can relax after classes. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Cresta School of Management.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very clean and hygenic. Hostel is maintained clean. Food was good enough and have a sports coach to train us.

reviews.review_heading: Cresta- a college that meets your expectations upto a certain level.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well and good in cresta. It has a good campus with a ground for sports. Spacious and well ventilated classrooms, stage for programs and excellent teachers. About the hostel food, I've heard from my friends that the hostel food isn't that good. But the canteen food is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the right choice for my career.
reviews.review_text: The unique infrastructure is student-friendly, and there is lush greenery around the campus which makes it easier for us to concentrate in the classes. The college has numerous courses to pick from following our interest. The college also has a canteen which serves good food throughout the day, and the pricing is quite affordable.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best management college in Mysore.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very beautiful infrastructure with excellent ventilation and greenery all around the campus. There is a very good canteen which is very hygienic and well maintained. The college also has indoor and outdoor sports and provides transportation in and around the city of Mysore.

reviews.review_heading: It is a completely unique and student-friendly college one can choose from.
reviews.review_text: It has a smart campus with spacious and well-lit classrooms. It provides students with individual seating arrangements and smart boards. The advanced facility available for students to enjoy is free Wi-Fi. A good library is available with very innovative seating arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: It is a young and dynamic institute that focuses on the overall development of the students.
reviews.review_text: It has a library to strengthen students' academic knowledge. The quality of food available in this college is good but expensive. The college offers lots of sports opportunities for students very often. The college is extremely social. Students are involved in most of the extracurricular and curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college but it is little expensive.
reviews.review_text: It provides good facilities in this college with a vibrant campus and greenery all around. This makes the college's environment very pleasant, calm, and exciting. The quality of the food in the canteen is very good and delicious. The college has a sports ground and a dedicated sports coach.

reviews.review_heading: Cresta gives everyone an equal opportunity for academics, sports and cultural activity.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good and is very student friendly atmosphere, specious classrooms with smartboards, projectors with individual sitting arrangements. Students have access to WI-FI and I'd like to call it as smart infrastructure. The college provides hostel facility separate for boys and girls which is completely safe and secure.

reviews.review_heading: It is a college that emphasizes the overall development of the students.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides a corporate feel. From classrooms to the canteen, the infrastructure is well-equipped with technologically advanced smart boards, projectors, touch display, and multi-media speakers. It has an auditorium that can accommodate more than 250 students for any event.

reviews.review_heading: Experience the best campus life of your under graduation should join Cresta .
reviews.review_text: We have well infrastructure like Microsoft campus we very much loved it actually we are enjoying our campus structure even we have been provided free WI-Fi in campus and then we have smart projectors in our class it has helps us learn things in a smart way.

reviews.review_heading: This college has a good infrastructure and excellent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It provides unique flip classrooms with smart board facilities. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus. It also provides laundry and Wi-Fi facilities in the hostel with 24X7 security with CCTV cameras. In case of emergencies, students will be taken to the hospital, and students are free to take part in all sports and games on campus.
